abstract: This course will be held online To join our zoom please RSVP on https://lu.ma/scala to get the zoom link We are also streaming the course live on Twitch if you want to join here: https://www.twitch.tv/softinio This is part 3 of 3 of this course. See/Subscribe to our Calendar to RSVP to the other parts here: https://lu.ma/scala
event_title: Functional Programming in Scala - Part 3 of 3
title: About this course
